title: Custom Emoji to add to Board Title
excerpt: I would like the ability to upload my company logo here so boards that represent our corporate projects are clearly shown with our emoji at the start of the board title.

posts.author: MichelleCampbell (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to upload my company logo here so boards that represent our corporate projects are clearly shown with our emoji at the start of the board title.
